Valuable Girl Project — Cycle 16

"3,000 girls in Upper Egypt
learned in a whole new way."

"And I'm one of them."

I'm Ghalia… a little sister in the Valuable Girl project.

If you'd met me a year ago, I'd have been a girl who dropped out of school…
Not because the schoolwork was hard…
But because I thought the problem was me.

"I just can't study."

But the truth was… the problem was never me.
Ghalia narrates
A Journey Along the Nile

The project reaches 5 governorates in Upper Egypt

The sun moves along the Nile from Minya to Luxor, revealing each governorate on its way

☀️
↓
Ghalia tells her story
Virtual Reality Headset

I used to memorize without understanding…
until I put on the VR headset

🥽 Tap here

The moment I tried it and played the educational videos, everything felt completely different.
I truly felt like I was inside the lesson… the planets around me, the stars close enough to touch.
The headset turned learning into a real live experience, not just a lecture — instead of trying to imagine it, I got to live the moment.

🎬 The educational videos shown inside the headset are provided by the Ministry of Education's website

Ghalia narrates

Ghalia narrates
From App to Impact

How the "Ghalia Values" app turned information into a real live experience

💭
📱
✨
IdeaAppExperience
🎯 The IdeaMy big sister wanted to teach me values like peace, honesty, and integrity — but not through memorizing or theory.
📱 From Theory… to a Real ExperienceShe designed a mobile app with questions, situations, and choices — I answer and see my own reaction for myself. The information became a situation, a decision, an experience I lived — not just words I heard and forgot.
Ghalia narrates
Economic Empowerment — My Big Sister's Story

Color the card to see her story

📌 My big sister didn't stop at teaching me… she used the same tools and invested her knowledge, marketed her own work, and reached out to real bookshops. Now she has a small, complete project that boosted her confidence and taught her planning and management.

Ghalia narrates
The Big Shift — A Ripple of Impact

AI reached every girl — step by step

👥Management Team
Trained the field team
🏃Field Team
Brought the tools to the big sisters
👩‍💻Big Sisters
Passed the experience to the little sisters

girls started learning a new way

The Ending — The Number That Became Light

"3,000"
Not a number — 3,000 stories.

Tap Ghalia 🎉

"And I… I'm not just one of the 3,000…
I'm part of a big change that started with an idea… and changed the way we all learn."

"See you again… at the end of the next cycle 👋
What do you think my story will be?"
